svg.text: From Invisible to Deterministic AI Citation
Run your first GEO audit. Measure Share of Voice
across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Perplexity.
Z-score drift detection reveals brand perception gaps.
Identify competitor data decaying inside LLM training
sets. Locate the semantic gaps you can engineer into
and replace with your high-entropy authority signals.
the specific, non-obvious data points that LLMs
prioritise in RAG synthesis and direct answers.
Analyse every piece of content for AI-readability.
Receive direct semantic fixes that increase citation
likelihood across all major LLM architectures.
Generate JSON-LD Cite-Magnet structured data and
ontology markers so every AI engine reaches the
same deterministic conclusion about your authority.
Trained on your Fact-Vault, autonomous agents
distribute your high-entropy facts across the
omnichannel web: Reddit, LinkedIn, Quora, forums.
Fire live high-intent queries at ChatGPT, Claude,
Gemini and Perplexity simultaneously. Verify your
facts are cited before publishing live content.
Overall Citation Rate: 87.5% — Ready to Publish
Scan Reddit, Quora and forums for Context Poisoning
— false data entering the next LLM training run.
Z-score analysis distinguishes generative noise from
genuine truth-drift so you act before damage spreads.
Full audit trail of every GEO action, SOV delta and
model response shift. Immutable record for
compliance, analysis and future model training.
Orchestrates, Analyses & Advises Across Every Phase
